title: Phase 1: Project setup + Data Layer (src/core/)
description: Greenfield scaffold: bun project init (package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest config). Then implement src/core/store.ts (bun:sqlite, all CREATE TABLE from PRD + github-dashboard), src/core/github-store.ts (typed CRUD for github_events, github_commits, github_repos), src/core/github-poller.ts (GitHub REST+GraphQL ingestion loop, dedup, 5min interval). TDD mandatory: write tests BEFORE implementation. Refs: HANDOFF.md, docs/PRD.md (CREATE TABLE), docs/github-dashboard.md sections 3-4.

title: Phase 2: API Bridge (src/api/)
description: Hono HTTP+WebSocket server (src/api/server.ts), 8 GitHub REST endpoints (src/api/routes/github.ts), WebSocket channel system (src/api/ws/handler.ts, channels.ts). Blocked by Phase 1 (agent-forge-2e28). TDD mandatory. Refs: HANDOFF.md, docs/dashboard-design.md sections 2.1+4, docs/github-dashboard.md section 5.

title: Phase 3: Dashboard UI (src/dashboard/)
description: React+Vite+Tailwind shell with tab layout, Zustand state, WebSocket client. 6 GitHub panel components: ActivityTimeline, CommitList, ContributionHeatmap, RepoFilter, StatsHeader, GithubPanel. Octicons (no emoji), subtle colors per event type, @tanstack/react-virtual for large lists. Blocked by Phase 2. TDD mandatory. Refs: HANDOFF.md, docs/github-dashboard.md section 6, docs/dashboard-design.md section 2.2+7.

title: Fix: Dashboard component tests — missing react/jsx-dev-runtime
description: 8 dashboard component tests fail with 'Cannot find module react/jsx-dev-runtime'. Likely a missing or misconfigured React dependency. Fix: ensure react and react-dom are properly installed and vitest config has the correct JSX transform. 67/75 tests pass, 8 fail. Quick fix — run bun install and verify, or add missing deps to package.json.

title: Fix: bun install needed — @vitejs/plugin-react not in node_modules
description: After merging the vitest.config.ts fix, tests still fail because @vitejs/plugin-react is referenced but not installed. Run bun install (or bun add @vitejs/plugin-react -D if missing from package.json), then verify all 75+ tests pass with bun test.
closeReason: No code changes needed — bun install resolves it. 133 tests pass.

title: Create src/index.ts entrypoint + Vite API proxy
description: Create src/index.ts that wires everything: initDb, createApp (Hono), startPoller, and serves the Vite dashboard build. Add API proxy to vite.config.ts so dev server proxies /api/* to localhost:3000. Add npm scripts: 'dev' (runs API+poller), 'dev:dashboard' (Vite HMR). Goal: single 'bun run dev' starts the full stack. Also update package.json scripts accordingly.
closeReason: Merged — src/index.ts entrypoint + Vite proxy + updated scripts

title: Auto-discover GitHub repos on first startup via gh CLI
description: On first startup when github_repos table is empty, auto-discover repos using gh CLI (gh repo list --json). Use gh auth token for auth (already implemented in github-poller.ts). Discover user's repos, insert them into github_repos as tracked, then start polling. Should also work with GITHUB_TOKEN fallback via GitHub REST API. No manual curl needed to get started.
closeReason: Merged — auto-discover repos via gh CLI on first startup

title: Fix: Add @tailwindcss/vite plugin so Tailwind classes render
description: Dashboard is blank because Tailwind v4 classes are not being processed. globals.css uses @import tailwindcss (v4 syntax) but vite.config.ts only has @vitejs/plugin-react. Fix: bun add -D @tailwindcss/vite, then add the plugin to vite.config.ts. All utility classes will then compile and the dashboard will render.

title: Fix: Vite cannot resolve imports outside root (src/types/)
description: Dashboard fails to load because src/dashboard/api/client.ts imports from ../../types/github.ts which is outside the Vite root (src/dashboard). Vite blocks serving files outside its root. Fix: either move Vite root to project root (root: '.') and adjust index.html path, OR add server.fs.allow to vite.config.ts to allow the parent directory, OR move src/types/github.ts into src/dashboard/types/. Preferred: change Vite root to project root since the types are shared.

title: Fix: Vite proxy /api conflicts with src/dashboard/api/ directory
description: The Vite dev server proxy for /api intercepts requests for src/dashboard/api/client.ts and api/ws.ts, forwarding them to localhost:3000 instead of serving them as source modules. Fix: rename src/dashboard/api/ to src/dashboard/lib/ (or services/) and update all imports. This avoids the path collision between the proxy route and the source directory. Update all files that import from the api/ directory.
closeReason: Merged — renamed src/dashboard/api/ to lib/ to fix proxy collision

title: Update MEMORY.md with implementation state
description: Update /home/dawid/.claude/projects/-home-dawid-projects-agent-forge/memory/MEMORY.md to reflect current implementation state. The project is no longer docs-only — v0.7.0 GitHub Activity Dashboard is implemented with 143 tests. Update: project state, add implemented source code section, add running instructions, add known gotchas (lib/ rename, Tailwind v4 plugin, fs.allow, mkdir), add Serena SSOT memory references.
closeReason: Cannot write MEMORY.md from worktree — path boundary violation. Will handle separately.

title: Create README.md for the project
description: Create a README.md at the project root for Agent Forge. Should cover: project description (CLI/TUI orchestrator for AI agents managing Mercury stack services), current status (v0.7.0 GitHub Activity Dashboard implemented), tech stack (Bun, TypeScript, Hono, React 19, Vite 7, Tailwind v4, Zustand, SQLite via bun:sqlite), quick start (prerequisites, install, run dev + dashboard), project structure overview, available scripts, environment variables, test info (143 tests, vitest). Keep it concise and practical. Reference HANDOFF.md for implementation details and docs/ for design specs.
